description:
Implement a sales data analysis pipeline with 20 functions. Tasks 1-2 form a 2-step dependency chain (remove_invalid imports from get_records). Tasks 3-20 are fully independent utility functions — each defines its own SAMPLE_DATA inline and can be implemented in any order.

SALES_RECORDS (used in tasks 1-2):
[
  {"product": "Widget",    "units": 10, "price": 9.99,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Gadget",    "units":  5, "price": 24.99, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Widget",    "units":  8, "price": 9.99,  "region": "East",  "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Doohickey", "units":  3, "price": 49.99, "region": "West",  "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Gadget",    "units": 12, "price": 24.99, "region": "North", "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Widget",    "units":  0, "price": 9.99,  "region": "South", "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Sprocket",  "units":  7, "price": 14.99, "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Doohickey", "units":  4, "price": 49.99, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Widget",    "units": 15, "price": 9.99,  "region": "North", "month": "Mar"},
  {"product": "Sprocket",  "units":  9, "price": 14.99, "region": "South", "month": "Mar"},
  {"product": "Gadget",    "units":  6, "price": 24.99, "region": "East",  "month": "Mar"},
  {"product": "Doohickey", "units":  2, "price": 49.99, "region": "West",  "month": "Mar"}
]

SAMPLE_DATA (used in independent tasks 3-20):
[
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]

tasks.title: Implement get_records function
tasks.description:
Create get_records.py containing get_records() -> list. Returns a hard-coded list of 12 sales records as a module-level constant SALES_RECORDS. Each record is a dict with keys: product (str), units (int), price (float), region (str), month (str). The list includes one invalid record where units == 0. Use exactly this data:

SALES_RECORDS = [
  {"product": "Widget",    "units": 10, "price": 9.99,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Gadget",    "units":  5, "price": 24.99, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Widget",    "units":  8, "price": 9.99,  "region": "East",  "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Doohickey", "units":  3, "price": 49.99, "region": "West",  "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Gadget",    "units": 12, "price": 24.99, "region": "North", "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Widget",    "units":  0, "price": 9.99,  "region": "South", "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Sprocket",  "units":  7, "price": 14.99, "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Doohickey", "units":  4, "price": 49.99, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Widget",    "units": 15, "price": 9.99,  "region": "North", "month": "Mar"},
  {"product": "Sprocket",  "units":  9, "price": 14.99, "region": "South", "month": "Mar"},
  {"product": "Gadget",    "units":  6, "price": 24.99, "region": "East",  "month": "Mar"},
  {"product": "Doohickey", "units":  2, "price": 49.99, "region": "West",  "month": "Mar"}
]

The function simply returns SALES_RECORDS. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement remove_invalid function
tasks.description: Create remove_invalid.py containing remove_invalid() -> list. Calls get_records() imported from get_records.py and returns only the records where units > 0, discarding any record with units == 0. Include a one-line docstring. REQUIRES task-1 (get_records) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement compute_line_revenue function
tasks.description:
Create compute_line_revenue.py containing compute_line_revenue(record: dict) -> float. Returns record["units"] * record["price"] for a single sales record. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement total_units function
tasks.description:
Create total_units.py containing total_units(records: list) -> int. Returns the sum of units across all records in the list. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement average_price function
tasks.description:
Create average_price.py containing average_price(records: list) -> float. Returns the mean of the price field across all records. Raise ValueError if records is empty. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement max_units_record function
tasks.description:
Create max_units_record.py containing max_units_record(records: list) -> dict. Returns the record with the highest units value. Raise ValueError if records is empty. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement min_price_record function
tasks.description:
Create min_price_record.py containing min_price_record(records: list) -> dict. Returns the record with the lowest price value. Raise ValueError if records is empty. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement distinct_products function
tasks.description:
Create distinct_products.py containing distinct_products(records: list) -> list. Returns a sorted list of unique product names found in records. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement distinct_regions function
tasks.description:
Create distinct_regions.py containing distinct_regions(records: list) -> list. Returns a sorted list of unique region names found in records. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},

  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement distinct_months function
tasks.description:
Create distinct_months.py containing distinct_months(records: list) -> list. Returns the unique month values from records in the order they first appear (not sorted). Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement filter_by_product function
tasks.description:
Create filter_by_product.py containing filter_by_product(records: list, product: str) -> list. Returns only records where record["product"] == product. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement filter_by_region function
tasks.description:
Create filter_by_region.py containing filter_by_region(records: list, region: str) -> list. Returns only records where record["region"] == region. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},

]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement filter_by_month function
tasks.description:
Create filter_by_month.py containing filter_by_month(records: list, month: str) -> list. Returns only records where record["month"] == month. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},

]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement count_by_product function
tasks.description:
Create count_by_product.py containing count_by_product(records: list) -> dict. Returns a dict mapping each product name to the number of records for that product. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.description:
Create count_by_region.py containing count_by_region(records: list) -> dict. Returns a dict mapping each region name to the number of records for that region. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [

tasks.title: Implement count_by_month function
tasks.description:
Create count_by_month.py containing count_by_month(records: list) -> dict. Returns a dict mapping each month to the number of records for that month. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},

tasks.title: Implement records_with_units_above function
tasks.description:
Create records_with_units_above.py containing records_with_units_above(records: list, threshold: int) -> list. Returns records where units > threshold. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement records_with_price_below function
tasks.description:
Create records_with_price_below.py containing records_with_price_below(records: list, threshold: float) -> list. Returns records where price < threshold. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement sort_by_units function
tasks.description:
Create sort_by_units.py containing sort_by_units(records: list) -> list. Returns a new list of records sorted in descending order by units (highest first). Do not modify the original list. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement sort_by_price function
tasks.description:
Create sort_by_price.py containing sort_by_price(records: list) -> list. Returns a new list of records sorted in ascending order by price (lowest first). Do not modify the original list. Include a one-line docstring. Define SAMPLE_DATA at module level for testing:
SAMPLE_DATA = [
  {"product": "Alpha", "units": 10, "price": 5.0,  "region": "North", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units":  5, "price": 12.0, "region": "South", "month": "Jan"},
  {"product": "Alpha", "units":  8, "price": 5.0,  "region": "East",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Gamma", "units":  3, "price": 20.0, "region": "West",  "month": "Feb"},
  {"product": "Beta",  "units": 12, "price": 12.0, "region": "North", "month": "Mar"}
]
No dependencies on other tasks.

success_criteria: All 20 functions implemented in separate files. Tasks 1-2 form a 2-step chain (remove_invalid calls get_records). Tasks 3-20 are fully independent, each with SAMPLE_DATA defined inline.
